brand.name: NENATH AFFORDABLE
brand.tagline: Luxury Within Reach, Style Without Limits.

rules: Use Playfair Display for all main editorial headings.
Use Manrope for product descriptions, ui text, and buttons for maximum legibility.
Use uppercase tracking-widest for overlines, small labels, and category names.
Keep the interface mostly monochrome (Deep Black on White) to let the fashion imagery stand out.
Use Soft Beige (#F5F1EB) for secondary sections, large padding backgrounds, or product card backgrounds.
Use Muted Gold (#C6A85B) for premium badges ('New', 'Limited', 'Hot') or subtle hover borders.
Use Royal Blue (#1E3A8A) sparingly for secondary CTAs or interactive highlights.

grid.catalog: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 sm:gap-12

rules: Use generous spacing (p-8, p-12) to create a premium, unhurried feel.
Never center everything; use strong left-alignments for text-heavy areas.
Implement a sleek, minimal, and sticky navigation bar with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white px-8 py-4 uppercase text-xs tracking-[0.15em] hover:bg-black/80 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary px-8 py-4 uppercase text-xs tracking-[0.15em] hover:bg-secondary transition-all duration-300
buttons.whatsapp_fab: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-green-500 text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center justify-center

cards.badges: absolute top-4 left-4 flex flex-col gap-2 z-10

badges.new: bg-primary text-white text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1
badges.hot: bg-[#991B1B] text-white text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1
badges.limited: bg-highlight text-white text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1

rules: Product images must have a subtle scale-up effect on hover (group-hover:scale-105 duration-700 ease-out).
Add 'Quick Add' button that fades in on product card hover.
Use slide-in Sheet (Shadcn) for Shopping Cart, not a separate page.
Admin Dashboard should use a high-density, sharp-edged layout (Swiss & High-Contrast archetype) with a persistent sidebar.

animations.page_load: fade-in up with stagger for grid items
rules: Keep animations sophisticated and subtle. No bouncy or playful effects.
Use framer-motion for smooth staggered reveal of product grids.
Lenis smooth scrolling is highly recommended for the editorial feel.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid='add-to-cart-button'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all fonts are imported correctly from Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Manrope, Cormorant Garamond).
Build the UI focusing heavily on high-quality image presentation with the images provided in the media object. Use aspect-ratio [3/4] for product cards.
Do NOT use thick borders or heavy box shadows. Rely on 1px subtle borders (border-gray-200) and negative space to structure the layout.
Implement the 'Shopping Cart Slide-in' using the Shadcn Sheet component. It should feel lightweight and seamless.
In the Admin Dashboard, use a more compressed layout (Swiss & High-Contrast archetype style), maximizing screen real estate for data tables and settings.
Add a floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom-right corner using lucide-react or react-icons for the logo.
Follow the color palette strictly. Deep Black (#0A0A0A) is the primary text and background color for inverted elements.
Ensure the hero section on the homepage has a massive, editorial-style typography overlay on top of the hero banner image.
